expectations.text: Maps CIS Controls 1-8 to NIST CSF 2.0 functions with category identifiers
expectations.evidence: Full mapping table with CSF 2.0 function and category codes (DE.AE-3, ID.AM-1, PR.DS-1 etc.)

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Control 8 as the primary Detect function coverage in Controls 1-8
expectations.evidence: States "Only CIS Control 8 (Audit Log Management) maps to the Detect function within 1-8"

expectations.text: States that Controls 1-2 map to the Identify function (ID.AM)
States that Controls 3-6 map primarily to the Protect function (PR.DS, PR.AA)
Recommends Control 13 for fuller NIST CSF Detect coverage
expectations.evidence: Recommends Control 13 (NDR, SIEM) and Control 18 for full Detect coverage
